keywords.name: common-plane
keywords.description: List common-plane data (unit normal vector and reference point) and type (see the Contact Types table in the Theory and Background section.

keywords.name: continuously-yielding
keywords.description: List additional parameter used for continuously yielding model.

keywords.name: displacement-normal
keywords.description: List subcontact normal displacements.

keywords.name: displacement-shear
keywords.description: List subcontact shear displacements.

keywords.name: distances
keywords.description: For vertex-face or edge-edge contacts print the distance of the vertex to the common plane.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: List contact extra variable information.

keywords.name: face
keywords.description: List block face information for sub-contacts

keywords.name: face-face
keywords.description: List data only for face-to-face contacts – must precede other keywords.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: List contact group information.

keywords.name: orientation
keywords.description: List contact dip and dip direction.

keywords.name: joint-set
keywords.description: List joint-set ID information for contacts.

keywords.name: no-lf
keywords.description: List should exclude leader-follower contacts in joined blocks.

keywords.name: null
keywords.description: List should exclude data for “non-null” contacts.

keywords.name: no-null
keywords.description: List should exclude data for “null” contacts.

keywords.name: pore-pressure
keywords.description: List fluid pressure at contacts.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: List contact contact positions.

keywords.name: state
keywords.description: List state of contacts: area, fs/fn, shear displacement, slip indicator. Slip indicator depends on material model. Need link here to joint constitutive model manual.

keywords.name: stress
keywords.description: List sub-contact shear and normal stress data.

keywords.name: subcontacts
keywords.description: List data for contacts in two tables – intended for transferring contact data to a file for use in post-processing. Output is only sent to the log file, which must be turned on by the user.

keywords.name: summary
keywords.description: List a summary of sub-contacts in the model; gives totals by material type, open and slipping contacts; and gives slip area and maximum displacements.

keywords.name: total
keywords.description: Print total forces, displacements and area for contacts.

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: List information according to contact type.

keywords.name: property-value
keywords.description: List the value of the input property \(s\) .

keywords.name: vertex
keywords.description: List displacement data for vertices associated with subcontacts.

keywords.name: weights
keywords.description: Print weights for vertex-face and edge-edge contacts.
